case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. YANET MARILU NAVAS RAMIREZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-05-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AUG-07-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT YANET MARILU NAVAS RAMIREZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ALLYSN OVERTON; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-14-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NAVAS RAMIREZ, YANET MARILU $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,650.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
